im messing around pretty hard with this meme comp
shuffle a lot of crap into their hand so they cant draw anything useful
yeet their wheels, posse spam is op, then theyre forced to use or hand is clogged -> you spam them back with more debuffs
frankly core of this is faros, data wheel, and karen wheel
everything else is mostly flex
does gun cry randomise from their 4 wheels or from their entire collection?
from any wheel in the game
holy hell thats funny
it can land on something better
or land on garbo
or land on exact same wheel
then it shuffles itself into enemy deck
same with the other posse (only choose debuff ver cause debuffs suck a lot more than buffs)

if they bring any high cost wheels, like 5 cost
yeet, -5 arith for them
sounds like it could theoretically backfire tho, given the enemy can use it on you
and since you spam their deck its harder to get back
yes which is why if you run it you either need to beat them up before they draw and use it on your wheel
or your wheels dont matter
in this case by the time they draw the posse theyre kinda stuck anyway
ruining their hand draw, paralyzing with horla, debuff galore
usually this team ends up at lategame
and if you run a combo that can nuke quite easily like horla nymph or something else theyre mostly done for
maybe can run magic hat for more troll
on tank or something

celeste

eh its four mana, celeste has stronger control with taunt and reinforce
ntm she needs to have it that turn or next when celeste died

Then you kill her and if the enemy have revive posse
She can't instantly exalt to revive everyone
